name: unifi-network
description: Manage your UniFi network — devices, clients, WiFi SSIDs, VLANs, firewall rules, port forwarding, and guest vouchers.

UNIFI_HOST.description: Hostname or IP of your UniFi Network controller (e.g. https://192.168.1.1 or https://unifi.local)

UNIFI_SITE.description: UniFi site ID to manage — use 'default' if you only have one site

UNIFI_VERIFY_SSL.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates. Set to false for self-signed certs (typical in homelabs)
